name: claude-next-level
description: George's curated Claude Code plugins for automation, architecture, and workflow

plugins.name: nest-test
plugins.description: Minimal test to verify claude -p can run from inside a hook

plugins.name: grandslam-offer
plugins.description: Grand Slam Offer workshop with adversarial agent teams. Builds irresistible offers using Hormozi's $100M Offers methodology, stress-tested by marketer, strategist, and customer persona agents.

plugins.name: hundred-million-leads
plugins.description: Lead generation workshop with adversarial agent teams. Builds complete lead gen systems using Hormozi's $100M Leads methodology — lead magnets, Core Four channels, outreach scripts, and Rule of 100 execution plans, stress-tested by growth hacker, marketer, strategist, and customer persona agents.

plugins.name: cycle
plugins.description: Unified PR review system: /cycle:pr shepherds one or many PRs through review with dispatch-and-poll fix agents, worktree management, and CodeRabbit patterns.

plugins.name: jj-commands
plugins.description: Jujutsu (jj) version control workflows — replaces git commit/push/PR commands in JJ repos. Detects .jj/ directory and handles describe, push, bookmark, PR creation, conflict resolution, and undo.
